retrieved_result: Newsroom April 9, 2018Center Stage announces Spring 2018 entertainment series at BYU-Idaho The Center Stage Performing Arts Series at Brigham Young University-Idaho has announced its Spring Semester lineup that ranges from a popular Brazilian guitarist to a comic illusionist.
